title: arthromeris himalayensis var. niphoboloides
intro: Arthromeris himalayensis var. niphoboloides, also known as Himalayan Arthromeris, is a rare and endangered species of fern found in the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Arthromeris himalayensis var. niphoboloides is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which can be consumed as teas or added to traditional remedies for its medicinal properties.
